reviews.review_description: Please how i can upgrade to primum

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your interest , we’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the app!

Our Premium version will be available soon, offering additional features and content. We’ll announce it as soon as it launches.

If you’d like to learn more or be notified when it becomes available, please contact us through our website:
www.cicwlearn.org

We appreciate your support!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words, we truly appreciate your support!

We’re excited to share that the Premium version is coming soon, with more features and enhanced content. We can’t wait for you to experience it.

If you’d like updates or more information, feel free to contact us through our website:
 www.cicwlearn.org

Your encouragement means a lot to us.
